com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.resolver
SQL query and column-type resolvers for the JDBC failover store.

    Description
     
    DefaultFailoverStoreQueryResolver(String tablePrefix, Serializer serializer, DatabaseResolver databaseResolver, PayloadColumnResolver payloadColumnResolver)
